ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the user was active on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description or bio of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* User's privacy settings (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the engagement metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with these metrics */,
  "mentions_received" REAL /* Number of mentions received by the user */,
  "retweets_received" REAL /* Number of retweets received by the user */,
  "mentions_sent" REAL /* Number of mentions sent by the user */,
  "retweets_sent" REAL /* Number of retweets sent by the user */,
  "posts" REAL /* Total number of posts made by the user */,
  "likes_received" INTEGER /* Number of likes received by the user */,
  "likes_sent" INTEGER /* Number of likes sent by the user */,
  "comments_received" INTEGER /* Number of comments received by the user */,
  "comments_sent" INTEGER /* Number of comments sent by the user */,
  "shares_received" INTEGER /* Number of shares received by the user */,
  "shares_sent" INTEGER /* Number of shares sent by the user */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on user activities */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the network feature record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with these features */,
  "feature_1" REAL /* Value of network feature 1 */,
  "feature_2" REAL /* Value of network feature 2 */,
  "feature_3" REAL /* Value of network feature 3 */,
  "feature_4" REAL /* Value of network feature 4 */,
  "feature_5" REAL /* Value of network feature 5 */,
  "feature_6" REAL /* Value of network feature 6 */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the network feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of network feature (e.g., social, content, interaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_features_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, post, retweet) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment (e.g., High Engagement, Low Engagement) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the user segment */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the segment */,
  "segment_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment was created */,
  "segment_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this prediction is for */,
  "predicted_followers" INTEGER /* Predicted number of followers for the user */,
  "predicted_engagement" REAL /* Predicted engagement score for the user */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "campaign_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign metric record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign this metric relates to */,
  "followers_gained" INTEGER /* Number of followers gained during the campaign */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate during the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the campaign received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the campaign received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "campaign_cost" REAL /* Cost of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this setting belongs to */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the setting (e.g., 'privacy', 'notifications') */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_integrations" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the API integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the integration */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the platform's data */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for accessing the platform's data */,
  "api_status" TEXT /* Status of the API integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "api_last_sync" TEXT /* Last date and time the API was synchronized */,
  "api_sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of API synchronization (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
